description: Elegant heritage-style end-unit townhome at Livia, in the heart of Richmond.This well-maintained 2.5-storey residence features 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, a side-by-side garage, and two outdoor parking spaces, along with quartz countertops, premium cabinetry and appliances, and upscale lighting and plumbing fixtures. Enjoy panoramic rooftop patio views and a serene park-like setting.Additional features include radiant in-floor heating throughout including the garage, and a heat pump installed 4 years ago. Recent upgrades include polyaspartic coating on the garage floor, light fixtures, repainted interior walls, carpet on the stairwell, updated sink, fridge, and laundry tower.Conveniently located steps from schools, parks, and trails, with easy access to shopping malls, fre
